creator: ports@logvinov.com
text:
Fix build with WITH_451PATCH.

How-To-Repeat: 
# make WITH_451PATCH=yes
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Extracting for linux-ut-451,1

=> MD5 Checksum OK for linux-ut/unreal.tournament.official.bonus.pack.collection.run.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for linux-ut/unreal.tournament.official.bonus.pack.collection.run.
=> No MD5 checksum recorded for linux-ut/UTPGPatch451.tar.bz2.
=> No SHA256 checksum recorded for linux-ut/UTPGPatch451.tar.bz2.
=> No suitable checksum found for linux-ut/UTPGPatch451.tar.bz2.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/games/linux-ut.
